allow: PowerShell(netstat -ano | findstr ":3000 " | findstr "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim\(\).Split\(\)[-1] } | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd c:\\aiprojects\\ar-photo; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npm run dev > C:\\Temp\\nextjs-https.log 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; Get-Content C:\\Temp\\nextjs-https.log -Tail 6)

PowerShell(netstat -ano | findstr ":3000 " | findstr "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_.Trim\(\) -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd c:\\aiprojects\\ar-photo; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npm run dev > C:\\Temp\\nextjs-https.log 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Get-Content C:\\Temp\\nextjs-https.log -Tail 6)
